SEARCH
Package ru.tehkode.permissions.backends

Class PermissionBackend

java.lang.Object
ru.tehkode.permissions.backends.PermissionBackend
Direct Known Subclasses:
FileBackend, MemoryBackend, MultiBackend, SQLBackend
public abstract class PermissionBackend extends Object
Backend for permission Default group: Groups have a default flag. All users are in groups with default marked true. No default group is required to exist.

      public abstract int getSchemaVersion()
      Return the current schema version. -1 indicates that the schema version is unknown.

      The current schema version

      Update the schema version. May be a no-op for unversioned schemas.

      version - The new version

    • getUserIdentifiers

      public abstract Collection<String> getUserIdentifiers()
      Return list of identifiers associated with users. These may not be user-readable
      Returns:
      Identifiers associated with users

    • getUserNames

      public abstract Collection<String> getUserNames()
      Return friendly names of known users. These cannot be passed to getUserData(String) to return a valid user object
      Returns:
      Names associated with users

      public abstract Collection<String> getGroupNames()

      PermissionBackendException

    • getLogger

      public final Logger getLogger()

    • loadFrom

      public void loadFrom(PermissionBackend backend)
      Load data from alternate backend. Assume that this overwrites all data in the receiving backend (except for users not included in transferring backend)
      Parameters:
      backend - The backend to load data from

      public void revertUUID()

      public void setPersistent(boolean persistent)

      Return class name for alias
      Parameters:

      Class name if found or alias if there is no such class name present

      public static Class<? extends PermissionBackend> getBackendClass(String alias) throws ClassNotFoundException

      Parameters:
      alias -
      Returns:
      Throws:

    • getBackendAlias

      public static String getBackendAlias(Class<? extends PermissionBackend> backendClass)
      Return alias for specified backend class If there is no such class registered the fullname of this class would be returned using backendClass.getName();
      Parameters:
      backendClass -
      Returns:
      alias or class fullname when not found using backendClass.getName()

    • getBackend

      public static PermissionBackend getBackend(String backendName, org.bukkit.configuration.Configuration config) throws PermissionBackendException
      Returns new backend class instance for specified backendName
      Parameters:
      backendName - Class name or alias of backend
      config - Configuration object to access backend settings
      Returns:
      new instance of PermissionBackend object
      Throws:
      PermissionBackendException

    • getBackend

      public static PermissionBackend getBackend(String backendName, PermissionManager manager, org.bukkit.configuration.ConfigurationSection config) throws PermissionBackendException
      Returns new Backend class instance for specified backendName
      Parameters:
      backendName - Class name or alias of backend
      manager - PermissionManager object
      config - Configuration object to access backend settings
      Returns:
      new instance of PermissionBackend object
      Throws:
      PermissionBackendException

    • getBackend

      public static PermissionBackend getBackend(String backendName, PermissionManager manager, org.bukkit.configuration.ConfigurationSection config, String fallBackBackend) throws PermissionBackendException
      Returns new Backend class instance for specified backendName
      Parameters:
      backendName - Class name or alias of backend
      manager - PermissionManager object
      config - Configuration object to access backend settings
      fallBackBackend - name of backend that should be used if specified backend was not found or failed to initialize
      Returns:
      new instance of PermissionBackend object
      Throws:
      PermissionBackendException
